author: Sam Larson
name: Record: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ + Selective Pruning + Parallel Muon
blurb: XSA on all 11 layers (vs standard last-4), Full Hessian GPTQ int6, selective ±1 magnitude pruning, Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon. Built on PR #593 stack with LeakyReLU(0.5)², BigramHash(2048), Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, VE128, SmearGate, U-Net skips, EMA(0.997), Tight SWA, lzma compression.
